basics.name: David
basics.label: Frontend Developer
basics.summary:
Frontend Developer specialized in building clean, accessible, and meticulously crafted interfaces. I care that experiences not only work well but are a pleasure to use — from component architecture to the last pixel.

I learn quickly and like to stay current: I follow industry trends closely, new tools, and how artificial intelligence is changing the way we build software.

Although specialized in frontend, I also work with Unity on interactive projects and have 3D modeling skills — capabilities that let me bring a broader perspective to any digital product.

highlights: Development of a new Role-Plays product, integrating SCAI (WebSockets) and AI Factory (LLMs for scoring).
Creation of components and widgets for Syntphony Learning Tech (PHP, Moodle, HTML, JavaScript).
Implementation of features in the Syntphony Immersive Experiences admin portal, including OTP login.
Development of a web version of Syntphony Immersive Experiences with WebGL and Unity.
Maintenance of Syntphony Immersive Experiences documentation (Nextra, MD/MDX).
Migration of the Design System for the Syntphony Immersive Experiences portal.
Maintenance and optimization of frontend CI/CD pipelines: e2e tests, unit tests, and build optimization.
Development of new features for the mobile app 'eCliente' for Allianz.
Delivered the 'Angular Basics' course for Allianz staff.
Built XL insurance features in Angular 12 — bug fixes and component refactors (MAPFRE).
Migration of styles and functionalities for the Servihabitat portal with Liferay (Caixabank).
Creation of a calendar widget in a Liferay portlet (Educaixa/Caixabank).
Built high-impact RFP demo SPAs in Angular 9 (SEAT and Orange).
Built a design system with Storybook and Stencil.
PoC: exporting design tokens from Figma into a design system.
Built reusable web components with Angular 8 (Allianz).
Researched and built PoCs for the Phygital department.
Development of VR applications with Unity for the USIX2.0 project, a training app for the industrial sector.
Web Development with Adobe Experience Manager for the CasaSeat Retail Car Configurator project (SEAT: CODE).

work.summary: Taught 'Introduction to Unreal Engine' in the Master's in Advanced Video Game Development at La Salle Campus BCN.
Built a VR application (PhygitApp) showcasing phygital experiences in banking and customer service.
Simulated HUD and digital cockpit screens for a new SEAT vehicle.

highlights: IT problem resolution within the Wanup offices.
Creation of documentation related to the Systems and Helpdesk department.
Control and check of office hardware supplies.
Creation of new didactic exercises for the students.
Supported the lecturer in teaching the Animation 1 course.
At open-day events, guided prospective students through labs and answered questions.
Control of material and logistics of the laboratories.
